creator: jon@xyinn.org
text: This is probably related to this but I noticed that if I did multiple reboots in sequence, the ability for the wifi card to re-establish a connection diminished. I'm guessing this maybe regarding the state, but not OS state, but firmware state, I'm guessing there may be some sort of SRAM chip in there that is maintaining the previous state of the multiple and subsequent reboots. This may explain why if I wait a bit (I kinda have to right lol) it eventually is able to connect again.
